title: Bihar Elections 2025: Key issues dominate debates in Patepur
snippet_text: As the election campaign intensifies, voters in Patepur assembly constituency raise questions about infrastructure development, road connectivity, and agricultural support schemes.

title: High stakes battle in Patepur as rival candidates file affidavits
snippet_text: The election filing process completed today in Patepur. Multi-millionaire candidates and independent leaders enter the fray, making the contest highly unpredictable.

title: Welfare scheme execution becomes election issue in Patepur
snippet_text: Local reports indicate that MGNREGA work allocations and PMAY home delivery rates are taking center stage in public debates across Patepur assembly segment.
